title: -call chiropractor (tomorrow)
html:
August 2021 Yahir todo dump just before the OSU transfer: call chiropractor + wisdom teeth, hit back Kira and Charlee, Options for therapy, "finalize with Dave" (Dave Selinger), deposit checks at mom's house, OSU waitlist email, ping Ryan Fila, continue Python course, walk Lola.

TL;DR

  • Pre-OSU transition stack — health admin + relationship admin + tech-skill admin all in one note.
  • Earliest direct mention of "Options for therapy" — the 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream note repeatedly says "GET A therapist," confirming this thread.
  • Ryan Fila mention is one of the few captures of that contact — candidate for entity stub on next mention.

yahir gonzalez · osu · kira · dave selinger · lola · mom yahir · 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream

related.label: Ahmad Jamal stream — late-2022 polymath dump (jazz, crypto, ChatGPT, CS 162)
